arts.ttl: Real Madrid team news: Ancelotti provides Federico Valverde injury update ahead of Atletico Madrid clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti provides an update on Federico Valverde's injury status ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash with Atletico Madrid.

arts.ttl: Vinicius Junior outlines Real Madrid contract wish amid Saudi Pro League links
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Vinicius Junior outlines his contract wish amid speculation linking him with a sensational move to the Saudi Pro League.

arts.ttl: ‘I respect him a lot’: Ancelotti relishes Simeone rivalry in Champions League
arts.sum: Atlético travel to Bernabéu for last-16 first leg ‘It’s a special match in terms of emotions and pressure’ As Real Madrid prepare to host Atlético Madrid in a city derby in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday, Carlo Ancelotti said he is looking forward to another battle against his rival Diego Simeone. Heading into their 27th clash, with the two managers having faced each other more often than any other rival in their careers, they are tied at nine wins each along with eight draws. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Marcelo: “I am a Real Madrid fan until the end”
arts.sum: He spoke about Real Madrid for a fair bit, and talked about his fandom now that he has retired as a football player. Real Madrid legend Marcelo spoke to La Revuelta in a recent interview about his career.
